name: Random Monetary Amount Generator
short_description: Generates a random floating-point number representing a monetary amount, following a uniform distribution within a specified range and rounded to two decimal places.

inputs.name: lo
inputs.description: Lower bound of the random monetary amount

inputs.name: hi
inputs.description: Upper bound of the random monetary amount

name: Random Percentage Value
short_description: Generates a random percentage value between specified lower and upper bounds, rounded to two decimal places.

inputs.name: lo
inputs.description: Lower bound of the percentage range (inclusive).

inputs.name: hi
inputs.description: Upper bound of the percentage range (inclusive).

name: Format Money
short_description: Formats a numerical value into a currency string with two decimal places and comma separators.

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The numerical value to be formatted as currency.

name: Format Percentage Value
short_description: Formats a given float as a percentage string with two decimal places. For example, 5.25 becomes '5.25%'.

inputs.name: p
inputs.description: Numerical value to be formatted as a percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%, 10.25 for 10.25%)

name: Future Value of a Single Sum (Annual Compounding)
short_description: Calculates the future value of a single principal amount given an annual interest rate and number of years, compounded annually.

inputs.name: P
inputs.description: Initial principal amount

inputs.name: r_pct
inputs.description: Annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%)

inputs.name: n
inputs.description: Number of years

name: Portfolio Allocation by Percentage Weights
short_description: Allocate a lump sum across stocks, bonds, and real estate based on percentage weights for each asset class.

inputs.name: total
inputs.description: Total amount of money to invest.

inputs.name: w_stock
inputs.description: Percentage of total investment allocated to stocks.

inputs.name: w_bond
inputs.description: Percentage of total investment allocated to bonds.

name: Remaining Balance After End-of-Year Withdrawals
short_description: Calculates the remaining balance in an investment account after 'n' years, considering an initial principal, a fixed annual interest rate, and regular end-of-year withdrawals.

inputs.name: P
inputs.description: Initial principal amount invested

inputs.name: r
inputs.description: Annual interest rate as a decimal

inputs.name: n
inputs.description: Number of years for withdrawals and investment growth

inputs.name: W
inputs.description: Amount withdrawn at the end of each year

name: Volatility Band Calculation
short_description: Calculates the plausible range of an equity value after one year, considering a baseline growth rate and an expected volatility band.

inputs.name: P
inputs.description: Initial equity value

inputs.name: g_pct
inputs.description: Baseline growth rate for the next year (as a percentage, e.g., 10 for 10%)

inputs.name: v_pct
inputs.description: Expected market volatility band (as a percentage, e.g., 5 for  ±5%)

name: Diversification Risk: Adding New Asset
short_description: Calculates the change in portfolio risk (volatility) when adding a new asset, considering existing asset allocations, individual volatilities, and pairwise correlations.

inputs.name: A_s
inputs.description: Existing dollar amount in stocks

inputs.name: A_b
inputs.description: Existing dollar amount in bonds

inputs.name: A_re
inputs.description: Existing dollar amount in real estate

inputs.name: A_new
inputs.description: Dollar amount of the new asset to be added

inputs.name: vol_s_pct
inputs.description: Annualized volatility of stocks (in percent)

inputs.name: vol_b_pct
inputs.description: Annualized volatility of bonds (in percent)

inputs.name: vol_re_pct
inputs.description: Annualized volatility of real estate (in percent)

inputs.name: vol_new_pct
inputs.description: Annualized volatility of the new asset (in percent)

inputs.name: rho_sb
inputs.description: Correlation between stocks and bonds

inputs.name: rho_sre
inputs.description: Correlation between stocks and real estate

inputs.name: rho_bre
inputs.description: Correlation between bonds and real estate

inputs.name: rho_port_new
inputs.description: Correlation of the new asset with the existing portfolio as a whole

sympy_formulas.formula: ws**2 * sig_s**2 + wb**2 * sig_b**2 + wre**2 * sig_re**2 + 2*ws*wb * rho_sb * sig_s * sig_b + 2*ws*wre * rho_sre * sig_s * sig_re + 2*wb*wre * rho_bre * sig_b * sig_re

name: Template Problem Generator
short_description: Generates a specified number of problem instances for various financial templates, each with a unique random seed, and saves them to a JSON file.

inputs.name: output_file
inputs.description: The path to the JSON file where generated problems will be saved.

inputs.name: num_instances
inputs.description: The number of problem instances to generate for each financial template.
